negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_7aa30d83-4049-432f-a69d-6fc5a1387640
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle stopped at a four-way intersection under a clear blue sky. The hood of the car reflects the road ahead, showing a wide, quiet suburban street lined with houses and utility poles. Traffic lights hang above the intersection, all displaying green signals. On the left, a small, single-story house with a light-colored exterior and a brown roof is visible, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and shrubs. Across the street, another similar house is present, also with a brown roof and light-colored walls. A white SUV is seen driving across the intersection on the opposite lane of the ego vehicle, while a silver sedan waits at the stop line on the far right side of the frame. The road is marked with standard traffic lines, and trees and additional houses are visible in the background, reinforcing the suburban neighborhood setting.  As the video progresses, the ego vehicle performs an unprotected left turn at a green light, yielding to the oncoming white SUV from the opposite lane before completing the left turn, while the silver sedan remains stationary at the stop line. The traffic lights continue to display green, allowing the SUV to proceed smoothly. The surrounding environment, including the houses, trees, and utility poles, remains static, maintaining the tranquil suburban ambiance. By the end of the video, the scene depicts a calm and orderly intersection with minimal activity, emphasizing the peacefulness of the suburban area.
